extDescription.message: Reads agreement documents so you don't have to. Highlights potentially unfavourable clauses before you accept.

scoreSublabel.message: Pattern detection only - not legal advice.

stateIdle.message: No document detected on this page.

errorNoDeviceAI.message: On-device language model is not ready on this device.

disclaimerBody.message: Output produced by automated pattern detection on the user's device. Each flag references a verbatim excerpt so it can be verified independently. This is not a legal opinion, not legal advice, and is not affiliated with the publisher of the analysed document. The score reflects language patterns only and may be incomplete or wrong. Always read the original document before agreeing.

donationTitle.message: This extension is independent and free

donationBody.message: No ads. No tracking. No data sold. If it has been useful, a small contribution helps keep development going.

footerAttribution.message: Open source · independent · not affiliated with any third party
